correction_to_previous_claim.reason: Signed split-readout overlap was clipped and relabeled as physical purity before the logarithm. Values outside the physical interval cannot support a physical Renyi-2 entropy claim.

operator_semantics.M: signed readout translation; entries and eigenvalues may carry orientation or phase and need not be positive
operator_semantics.K_ret: M^dagger G M; positive semidefinite retained geometry
operator_semantics.chi_AB: signed split-readout overlap; may be negative
operator_semantics.physical_purity: Tr(rho^2) in [1/d, 1]; only this lane supports S2=-log(purity)
operator_semantics.negative_density_eigenmass: distance of a linear estimator from the PSD state cone, not negative probability

generic_state_audit.interpretation: Narrow positive support exists for stationary correlated channels; local-only improvement is unresolved and drift correction is refused.

claim_boundary: The architecture and signed semantic lane survive the audit. Physical Page-entropy recovery is not established.
